overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside a moving metro train in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera observes other passengers and watches the neon-lit cityscape pass by through the windows, featuring holographic advertisements, towering skyscrapers, and urban infrastructure. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, showing the NCART metro system.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a moving metro train car at night. The camera is seated, showing brown upholstered benches, a yellow support pole, and two other passengers - one hooded figure sitting on the left and another standing by the door on the right. Through the large windows, the blurred lights of the cyberpunk city streak past as the train moves forward.

The view shifts to the left window, showing industrial buildings and city infrastructure passing by as the train continues moving through the urban landscape.

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on the view through the left window as the train moves through an industrial district. Large warehouse buildings with exposed steel girders pass by, followed by a transition to a commercial area with distant skyscrapers and palm trees visible. The interior passengers are no longer in view as the camera faces the window.

segments.scene_description: The train passes a station platform marked with 'SARASTI X' and platform number '09' signs. The view transitions to modern glass office towers with illuminated windows, followed by concrete parking structures. A large holographic advertisement showing a robot face appears on a building facade as the train continues through the commercial district.

segments.scene_description: The train enters a tunnel with striking vertical yellow neon lights creating a rhythmic pattern. Exiting the tunnel, the view opens to a dense commercial district filled with massive holographic advertisements and neon-covered skyscrapers. The train then enters another dark tunnel section with minimal lighting, transitioning from the bright urban display to near darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: train passing Memorial Park station with holographic plaza view

segments.scene_description: The train passes a 'MEMORIAL PARK' sign and continues through a section with blue neon light features. Through large grated windows, the camera reveals a view of Memorial Park plaza containing massive holographic humanoid figures and displays. The scene shows a mix of industrial tunnel architecture and the futuristic plaza visible through the windows, with holographic effects visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of a moving metro train into a sweeping observation of a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape. It begins seated inside the car, where brown upholstered benches and a yellow support pole frame a hooded passenger and another figure by the door as city lights streak past the windows. As the camera pans left, the focus shifts from a passenger with a green bag toward the window, where the blurred urban backdrop clarifies into an industrial district of warehouse buildings and exposed steel girders. The scene then expands as the train leaves the industrial zone, gliding past distant skyscrapers and palm trees before passing a station platform marked Sarasti X. Finally, the view transitions into a dense commercial district of glass office towers and concrete parking structures, culminating in the sight of a massive holographic robot face illuminating a building facade.

The shot follows a continuous journey through a futuristic transit system that oscillates between rhythmic tunnel lighting and expansive, neon-drenched urban vistas. It begins as the train glides through a tunnel defined by striking vertical yellow neon lights before bursting out into a dense commercial district filled with massive holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers. The view then plunges back into a dark tunnel section with minimal lighting, creating a sharp contrast to the previous urban brightness. As the train continues, the darkness gives way to blue neon accents and a Memorial Park sign, eventually opening up to reveal a plaza featuring colossal holographic humanoid figures visible through large grated windows. The scene finally blends the industrial architecture of the tunnel with the distant, glowing displays of the futuristic park.
